title: Maargan
subTitle: A serial killer targets women with a strange serum that turns their bodies black. Subsequently, a high-ranking police officer sets out to catch the culprit.

title: Akale
subTitle: A minister's daughter longs for the love of her father, who holds a grudge against her. However, his aide's support of her leads to a series of unexpected events.

title: Krishnagadha
subTitle: Identical twins, separated at birth, face a cruel twist when one is forced to marry into a cursed family, unknowingly sacrificing herself for her sister.

title: Manathe Kottaram
subTitle: Haritha informs Karunakaran about Madhavan’s garage and the valuable land, urging him to secure a portion for Manoj. Later, Karunakaran confronts Prakash at his home.

subTitle: Shattering the shackles of her past struggles and societal norms, a single mother successfully raises her three young daughters.

title: Aval Arundhati
subTitle: Arundhati's untimely death leaves her husband and four children devastated. In the midst of their grief, Parvati, the family's long-time caretaker, steps up to provide comfort and support.
